vocab.meaning: làm cho sảng khoái, tiếp thêm sinh lực
vocab.example: I find a brisk morning walk to be incredibly invigorating, as it helps me clear my head before a long day at work.
To counteract the effects of a sedentary lifestyle, I make a conscious effort to walk at least ten thousand steps a day.

vocab.meaning: đi băng qua, đi ngang qua (một khu vực)
vocab.example: I regularly traverse the local park on my way home to enjoy some greenery amidst the urban jungle.

vocab.meaning: thân thiện với người đi bộ
vocab.example: My neighborhood is exceptionally pedestrian-friendly, with wide pavements and plenty of zebra crossings.

vocab.meaning: giải tỏa tâm trí, làm cho đầu óc minh mẫn
vocab.example: Walking is my go-to activity whenever I need to clear my mind and escape from the pressures of daily life.
On weekends, I often take a leisurely stroll along the riverbank to soak in the peaceful atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/gắng sức về thể chất
vocab.example: Walking doesn't require intense physical exertion, yet it is highly effective for maintaining cardiovascular health.
When I visit a new city, I prefer walking because it allows me to explore every nook and cranny that a bus might miss.

vocab.meaning: với tốc độ nhanh, hối hả
vocab.example: I usually walk at a brisk pace to ensure I get my heart rate up and burn a few extra calories.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: Whenever I have some spare time, I take the scenic route through the botanical gardens rather than the direct path.
